summary: Re-tested the two regressions reported in iteration_1 + chatbot E2E smoke + regression smoke for all previously-passing features. BOTH regressions are FIXED. (1) HeroScene now renders: data-testid='three-hero-scene' present with a 1152x1108 <canvas>; 3D orb, rings, particles, floating icosahedron are visually present in screenshot. (2) Chatbot trigger moved to bottom-LEFT (x=24, y=992, 64x64). document.elementFromPoint at trigger center returns the chatbot-trigger (closestTestid='chatbot-trigger'), NOT the Emergent badge. A real page.mouse.click (not JS .click()) opened the chatbot-panel. Full chatbot flow works end-to-end: send 'I need a quote for a mobile app' → Nova replies via Claude → chatbot-lead-form appeared → filled TEST_Chat_<ts> name + email → submit → 'Got it, ... reach out within 24 hours' confirmation rendered → lead persisted in GET /api/leads (now 5 leads). All previously-passing features still pass: hero-overline, 9 service cards, 5 capability tabs, 4 work cards, 3 testimonials, 24 client logos, 5 nav links, three-capabilities-scene canvas, contact-form. Zero console runtime errors on page load.
critical_code_review_comments: Both prior regressions resolved cleanly. No new issues observed.
App.js is now ~886 lines — consider splitting into Hero/Services/Capabilities/Work/Chatbot modules for maintainability (not blocking).

Chatbot lead-form trigger remains a regex on Nova's reply text (App.js Chatbot.send()). Works reliably for buying-intent prompts but is brittle if the model phrasing drifts; consider a structured tool-call or buying-intent classifier.
seed_data_creation: Added 1 chatbot lead (TEST_Chat_1781379170 / TEST_chatbot_1781379170@example.com) via the live chatbot UI; verified via GET /api/leads (total=5 including prior TEST_ leads).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both regression fixes (HeroScene render + chatbot trigger position) are verified working with real mouse interactions. Verification snippet: bbox of [data-testid=chatbot-trigger] should have x≈24 (bottom-LEFT). HeroScene canvas should be ~1152x1108 right-anchored. Nova reliably replies with 'drop your name and email' phrasing for buying-intent messages, which triggers the lead form regex in Chatbot.send(). Backend unchanged from iteration_1; pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py still valid.
rca of the issue: N/A — both prior regressions (HeroScene not rendered, chatbot trigger overlapped by Emergent badge) are now fixed and verified via DOM checks, elementFromPoint, and real mouse-click interactions.
